coreMeaning.en: resembling or characteristic of a thug

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: thug + ish = 像暴徒一样的

coreMeaning.en: a remote northern land; the northernmost known region of the ancient world

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: Thule = 古代地理上已知的最北端之地

coreMeaning.en: a rare metallic element, symbol Tm, atomic number 69

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: Thule(北欧)+ium=以北欧命名的金属元素

coreMeaning.en: the short thick first digit of the hand

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: thumb = 大拇指，最粗的手指

coreMeaning.en: past tense of thumb; leafed through with the thumb
present participle of thumb; leafing through or hitchhiking

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: thumb + ing = 用拇指翻阅或招手

coreMeaning.en: an instrument of torture for squeezing the thumb; thumbscrew

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: thumb(拇指)+kin(小)=夹拇指的小刑具

coreMeaning.en: the nail of the thumb; a small version of an image

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: thumb(拇指)+nail(指甲)=拇指甲；引申为缩略图

coreMeaning.cn: 缩略图（复数）；拇指甲（复数）

coreMeaning.en: a screw turned by the thumb; an instrument of torture

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: thumb(拇指)+screw(螺丝)=用拇指拧的螺丝/夹拇指的刑具

coreMeaning.en: a short pin with a large flat head for fastening paper

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: thumb(拇指)+tack(小钉)=用拇指按的小图钉

coreMeaning.en: a heavy dull blow or its sound

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: thump = 拟声词，砰的重击声

coreMeaning.en: past tense of thump; struck with a heavy blow

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: thump + ing = 砰砰作响的；巨大的

coreMeaning.en: the loud rumbling sound following lightning

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: thunder = 轰隆雷鸣，来自Thor（雷神）

coreMeaning.en: a mythical bird of North American Indigenous peoples said to cause thunder
a lightning flash with simultaneous thunder; a sudden overwhelming event
a single crash of thunder; a sudden shocking event
a cumulonimbus cloud producing thunder and lightning

coreMeaning.cn: 发出雷声；大声说（过去时）
coreMeaning.en: past tense of thunder; made a thundering noise

coreMeaning.cn: 雷神；发出雷鸣声的人或物

coreMeaning.en: a rounded mass of cumulus cloud at the top of a thunderstorm
making a thundering sound; impressively great
making a very loud, deep, resonant noise like thunder

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: thunder + ous = 充满雷鸣特质的
thunderous + ly = 以雷鸣般方式

coreMeaning.en: a storm with thunder and lightning and usually heavy rain

coreMeaning.cn: 目瞪口呆的；大为震惊的

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: thunder(雷)+struck(击中)=被雷打中般震惊

coreMeaning.en: accompanied by or suggestive of thunder

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: thunder + y = 充满雷声的天气

coreMeaning.en: an archaic or dialectal term for a tunny fish (tuna)
a character name in Shakespeare's The Two Gentlemen of Verona

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: Thurio = 莎士比亚《维罗纳两绅士》中的人物
